mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC remains below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict direction with statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a win rate above 55%, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices indicate strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which translates to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during mid-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: The positive predictive power of INDPRO reverses or vanishes during mid-cycle expansions, with 20-day forward returns showing a negative or zero correlation over a 24-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate level above 4.0 percent combined with CPIAUCSL above 212 signals restrictive real rates that suppress equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX yields positive 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or the threshold condition shows no predictive edge over a naive buy-and-hold benchmark.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm robust labor market tightening, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint labor signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a win rate above 52%, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in out-of-sample validation.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding economic output and corporate earnings potential, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show no positive correlation with 20-day forward returns over a 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Declines in the industrial production index during a post-shock recovery phase indicate weakening manufacturing demand and reduced corporate profit expectations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during post-shock recovery periods fail to predict negative 5-day returns, with SPX showing positive returns in > 58% of instances over a 24-month rolling window.
